recentTweets.text:
Donald Trump lost the 2020 election.

And now he’s trying to rig this year’s election with the SAVE America Act to make it harder to vote for millions of women, veterans, rural folks, & voters of color.

DEI policies have supported women in every aspect of their lives.

That’s why Republicans are hellbent on emboldening greater discrimination & dismantling civil rights protections.

Congress must codify gender equality & pass my bill to make the ERA the law of the land. https://t.co/62kXMxbyy1

I voted against $3.3B to fund genocide.

Mothers should not be burying their children. Babies should not be crying for their murdered parents. The US cannot continue to fund death and destruction carried out by the Israeli government.

The shift in a record number of Dems

Traffic stops have long been weaponized against people of color.

ICE agents are purposefully following & targeting our immigrant neighbors.

Just this week, they murdered two fathers in their cars. These unwarranted stops must be halted & ICE must be abolished.

Americans hold $500 billion in medical debt, burdened by the most challenging crises in their lives.

We used to have consumer protections to relieve that burden—until CFPB Director Vought rescinded them.

His legacy will be one of hurt & harm. The people deserve better. https://t.co/zKJ0Y2Ej3Z
RT @RepSummerLee: So now y’all support gender-affirming care?

Joan Sebastian Guerrero should be alive today. A dedicated dad & husband, working hard to support his family, Joan should be here with his wife & his 3-year-old daughter.

ICE agents executed him while his family watched in terror; forever traumatized.

Joan is the second father https://t.co/nsN8UzSIic
RT @OversightDems: Todd Blanche lacks the courage to release the Epstein Files and lacks the integrity to be Attorney General. The Senate s…

Like his predecessor, Todd Blanche has refused to release the full Epstein files.

He will continue the White House cover-up to protect Donald Trump. That’s why the Senate must reject his nomination.

Survivors deserve better.

The Black unemployment rate is alarmingly high, and our entire economy suffers as a result.

When Black workers lose, everyone loses.

That's why I demanded Fed Chair Warsh uphold the Federal Reserve’s mandate of maximum employment for ALL workers, especially Black workers. https://t.co/6lIL0ZYelz

Our parents are our first teachers.

My mother was my shero and example. And I saw policies up close that made life harder for her daily.

That’s why the Mamas’ Caucus agenda is so essential for our families to not just survive, but thrive. https://t.co/HitpXhN8PT

For many, their wheelchair is a lifeline.

My constituents shared with me how my FAST Repairs for Wheelchairs Act to remove burdensome requirements for wheelchair repairs would be essential to their mental & physical health, mobility, and everyday lives. https://t.co/GQDj0fQFxk

Nolan was a beloved son, student-athlete, & a Black boy who deserved to grow old.

Though true justice would mean Nolan would be alive today, we’re pushing for the accountability his family deserves.

I grieve for his loved ones & join their demands for an independent

I’m proud to deliver essential housing resources to families in the #MA7 & throughout the country.

This housing package & my four bills within it will bring necessary relief to families struggling to keep up with soaring housing costs.

Learn more about what my bills will do: https://t.co/aww2AUgNjB

My heart is with the family & loved ones of Louisa Gag, a beloved community member & public servant committed to making Boston a safer & more accessible city.

Her dedication to improving the livability of our streets, neighborhoods, & public spaces has made Boston a better

Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was a beloved husband & father who worked hard to provide for his family & strengthen his Houston community.

I stand with the Salgado family in demanding accountability & a full investigation.

No life should be stolen by ICE.

ABOLISH ICE. Accountability

Amber Nicole Thurman should be alive today.

Republican abortion bans cost her life-saving care, and eventually her life.

Her story is not an anomaly. We're fighting every day to save lives & fight for abortion care that is accessible & treated as the essential healthcare it is. https://t.co/vOoMqps4PV

If you aren’t a TPS holder yourself or have a loved one who is a TPS holder, know that TPS holders are essential to your daily life too.

We must act now to extend TPS for Haiti and ensure Haitian TPS holders can continue their contributions to our communities & care economy.

This Disability Pride Month, we celebrate the dignity, humanity, & joy of our siblings with disabilities.

As we commemorate the passing of the ADA, we affirm that disability rights are human rights and we must continue to dismantle barriers faced by the disability community.

Donald Trump, sign the damn bill.

Speaker Johnson, do your damn job.

This housing bill is long overdue. It is needed. It is popular. It is important. Everyone needs housing. https://t.co/60Qj0XKgiX

Frederick Douglass’ speech “What to the Slave is the Fourth of July?” serves as a powerful reminder of our nation’s greatest contradiction—an exclusive democracy.

As we mark America’s 250th we must remember: we cannot celebrate freedom while the U.S. denies it to millions. https://t.co/YetPQXjC6C

For America's 250th, I read Frederick Douglass’ speech, “What to the Slave is the Fourth of July?” on the House floor—for the first time in history.

His speech endures as a mirror & mandate for us all—to confront our inequities while fighting for an America as good as its https://t.co/fc996oC1D7

The lives, families, & futures of our TPS holders are not temporary.

They make incredible contributions to our healthcare, hospitality, & construction industries.

The SCOTUS ruling is a devastating comma, but it is not a finite period. We’re still fighting. https://t.co/dLN1iDOhtK
https://t.co/YBlnwfyFc3

Wheelchair breakdowns can be traumatizing & dangerous—often limiting wheelchair users' mobility & access to work, school, appointments & more.

My FAST Repairs for Wheelchairs Act is essential to livability & would streamline repair services by removing unnecessary paperwork. https://t.co/sKTMSopsOX

I introduced an amendment to ensure that states have the authority to take action to improve consumer protections.

And Republicans voted it down.

Grateful Massachusetts is leading the way & protecting consumers who were victims of predatory earned wage access products. https://t.co/0tABXi82UC

This ruling is nothing but transphobia from Trump's Supreme Court.

To our transgender siblings across the country: I'll continue fighting for the dignity and respect you deserve to thrive in every space you wish.

WATCH: I am delivering Frederick Douglass’s famous speech “What to the Slave is the 4th of July?” in Congress—for the first time in history.

Tune in now:

https://t.co/dNxAMsi8kC

We are witnessing a deeply concerning rise in human rights violations & criminalization of LGBTQIA+ individuals across the globe.

It is incumbent upon the US to protect our LGBTQIA+ siblings at home & abroad. That's why I'm urging @StateDept to take urgent action. https://t.co/5YKWeNY5nC

Anybody born on American soil is an American citizen, period.

Donald Trump has tried to rewrite our Constitution, reverse the progress of Reconstruction, and deny us our fundamental rights.

Not today. Not ever.
RT @ReproCaucus: Last week, our Members mobilized in commemoration of the fourth anniversary of the deadly #Dobbs decision. Our fight for r…

This ruling is welcome news.

But we cannot lose sight that Trump & Republicans are still attempting to use every tool to disenfranchise millions of voters.

We will continue to organize against their relentless campaign of voter suppression.

Trump’s brazen attempt to fire Governor Lisa Cook was always unlawful.

And his targeting of the only Black woman to serve on the Federal Reserve Board was always a racist, sexist attack.

We must continue preserving the Fed’s independence from blatant political interference.

The implications of the SCOTUS ruling to allow TPS termination are nothing short of catastrophic.

Seniors will lose their caregivers.
Business owners will lose their staff.
And children will lose their classmates.

This fight is not over. The Senate must act. https://t.co/tva4ANkZYl

The American people don’t need ballrooms, they need housing.

The ROAD to Housing package—including my four bills—would tackle the housing affordability crisis head-on.

We’ve passed this bill & we’re waiting on Trump to sign it into law. https://t.co/BZ1z1PxQKX

Maya Angelou once said, “There is no greater agony than bearing an untold story inside you.”

I'm grateful to those who shared their abortion story with me & re-affirmed why abortion care is essential.

Together, we're fighting for every person to have access to the care they https://t.co/KugyTnSods

Everyone should have the freedom to marry who they love.

That's why I'm grateful for every advocate who organized to make Obergefell v. Hodges possible.

And I won’t stop fighting to codify true equality for our LGBTQ+ siblings.

I commanded a moment of silence on the House floor to honor the women who have died because they were denied essential abortion care.

Everyday I will continue to fight for reproductive freedom in their name. Abortion care is a human right. https://t.co/WH8kJVbMem
RT @SalDiDomenico: I want to thank @RepPressley and @la_colaborativa   for hosting this essential community forum to give voice and space t…

The reporting coming out of Venezuela is heartbreaking.

I’m praying for the hundreds of people killed & those who have not been able to locate their loved ones.

This disaster has destroyed lives, livelihoods, & homes.

The US & our global community must provide support for the

RT @SenMarkey: The Trump administration says countries like Haiti and Syria are too dangerous for Americans to visit, yet today's SCOTUS de…

To the 1.3M TPS holders & their families:

Your lives & livelihoods matter.

Your humanity, dignity, & worth is not defined by the opinion of cruel, elitist, & wealthy conservatives on the Court or in the White House.

America is still your home, and this fight is not over. https://t.co/1WxVKnPEqv

RT @ReproCaucus: Must-watch. 

Thank you, Co-Chair @RepPressley, for laying bare exactly what happens under cruel abortion bans.  

We will…

BREAKING: Trump’s co-conspirators in the Supreme Court just ended Temporary Protected Status for Haitians and Syrians.

We’re at the Supreme Court because we’re not sitting idly by. Tune in now:

Denied care.

Today I offer a stark and damning picture, not to dissuade us from the work ahead, but to call us to action.

Let me be clear: abortion care is essential healthcare. https://t.co/vLwESnrh8M

The most robust housing package in decades just passed Congress—& Trump is refusing to sign it into law.

Instead of celebrating the ROAD to Housing, he's pushing us down the road to voter suppression.

Trump must support this package—& my bills in it—to expand housing for all. https://t.co/VPFq4NKIK9

RT @ReproCaucus: Four years.

Every day since #Dobbs has only reminded us of the urgency & the stakes of our fight.

Today, we honor those…
RT @ReproCaucus: Amber Nicole Thurman was 28 years old, a young mom and aspiring nurse, when Georgia's abortion ban blocked her from gettin…

Abortion care is healthcare and a fundamental human right.

Together we're pressing for true justice and liberation. For an America where every person gets the care they seek. Where abortion care is compassionate, accessible, and essential. https://t.co/Z8h9f7QRgZ

NEWS: I’m proud that Congress has passed my bills to:

—Confront racial bias in home appraisals
—Protect renters from abusive corporations
—Expand access to affordable housing &
—Help families build long-term financial stability

These bills move us closer to a more just America https://t.co/HZ4JQdxeUd

It was great to welcome Haitian Prime Minister Alix Didier Fils-Aim & Ambassador Lionel Delatour to Boston.

I’m proud to co-chair the Haiti Caucus & advocate for our neighbors.

We have a moral obligation to support Haiti’s stabilization & save lives. That means extending TPS & https://t.co/iXRDib1no0

For the first time ever, my Dad and I are sharing our story of forgiveness, growth, and love.

Wounds take time to heal but my Dad and I have made so much progress together.

I hope our story and journey helps, inspires, and heals. Happy Father’s Day, family. https://t.co/K7F7Zj1mCb

The story of our nation is incomplete without the ongoing work of liberation.

This Freedom Day, let us honor our ancestors through joy, action, organizing, and reparative policies that bring us closer to freedom.

Happy Juneteenth, family! https://t.co/nxCKDkvrs8

It was great to be back in Cambridge to celebrate the $1M we secured to establish the Cambridge Community Center as New England’s first Resilience Hub.

This hub will support our neighbors and Cambridge’s broader goals of climate resilience & emergency preparedness. https://t.co/cvemjksPSj

When a wheelchair breaks down, a person’s daily life is immediately altered.

And due to unnecessary paperwork, repair delays can last for months.

Listen to wheelchair users in the #MA7 explain why the FAST Repairs for Wheelchairs Act is essential. https://t.co/lFndr6nrTr

The testimonies I heard from families who have faced the violence & trauma of Trump’s mass deportation agenda were harrowing.

I heard from families who lost their breadwinners.

I heard from children who were traumatized by the absence of their loved ones.

I heard from mothers https://t.co/PxKKHZgShI

Since my discharge petition to extend Temporary Protected Status for Haitians successfully passed the House, we’ve been pressing hard to advance this fight.

We're ready to double down in the Senate and defend the safety, dignity, & humanity of Haitian neighbors once & for all.

BREAKING: I'm introducing my FAST Repairs for Wheelchairs Act.

This legislation would streamline wheelchair repair services by removing prior authorization requirements from Medicare Advantage plans.

Our wheelchair users should not have to wait months for minor repairs. https://t.co/0No9YaBXEw

A ceasefire is necessary & overdue.

Trump has supported Netanyahu’s barbaric warfare at the expense of communities at home & abroad—and we’ve been pressing hard to stop this war.

It’s essential this ceasefire holds & brings meaningful peace to the region.
Just your reminder that while Donald Trump does his vanity projects at the White House to appease his billionaire donors, he has done absolutely nothing to address the affordability crisis.

If this nation is serious about the next 250 years, it must prove it.

Our Reparative Justice Agenda is a reminder that reparations are not a charity. They are a debt long overdue. https://t.co/BHkOID55Tm
